audit_items.proof_trace: The check at L155-157 (`if (order.buyAmount < minBuyAmount) revert InsufficientBuyAmount`) is on the sole non-reverting execution path; `minBuyAmount` is computed by `_getAssetOutAmount` using validated oracle prices (`withValidation=true` on both sell-token and asset-out price fetches). There is no alternate path through `isValidSignature` that returns the magic value without passing this guard.
